plugins.name: correctless-lite
plugins.description: Lightweight correctness workflow for everyday development. 12 skills for structured development: spec-before-code, skeptical review with security checklist, enforced TDD with agent separation, verification, documentation, multi-lens PR review, debugging, and metrics. ~10-15 min overhead per feature.

plugins.name: correctless
plugins.description: Full correctness workflow for security-critical systems. 19 skills including formal modeling, multi-agent adversarial review, convergence auditing, mutation testing, and postmortem feedback loops. ~1-2 hours overhead per feature, but the code ships tested and assumption-challenged.
